scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-white
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-white

surfaces.card: bg-[#222222] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#FF6A00]/50 transition-colors duration-300 p-8
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#FF6A00] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white hover:text-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors
surfaces.button_secondary: border border-[#6B7280] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:border-white transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) and key data points MUST include data-testid attributes in kebab-case format (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. No Shadcn cards for public pages to ensure creative freedom. Use large asymmetric grids and dark overlays (bg-black/50 maximum) on images.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_admin: Use Shadcn UI components for data density. Keep it flat, #1A1A1A backgrounds with 1px border. No soft shadows.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react for all standard icons, ensuring a crisp technical feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import Barlow Condensed and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts in index.css or layout.
